title: sterculia tragacantha
intro: Sterculia tragacantha, also known as the spiny sterculia or the sterculia thorn, is a plant species in the family Sterculiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Madagascar. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and are believed to offer health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sterculia tragacantha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and topical creams.
